title: Flake Radar — predictive test selection and quarantine for AI-accelerated pipelines
non_goals: Replacing Forge CI runners or vendor-specific executor internals
Auto-merging or bypassing required checks without operator approval
Full ML model training pipeline or custom GPU infrastructure
acceptance_checks: Flake scorer ranks tests by instability using recent run history and surfaces top offenders per repo
Quarantine policy auto-marks chronic flakes and excludes them from blocking status with operator-visible audit trail
Predictive selection recommends a minimal test subset for PRs with estimated time savings vs full suite
Dashboard shows rerun multiplier and queue-wait ratio alongside MTTR trend line
summary: Give Forge teams a pipeline-native flake radar that scores test instability, auto-quarantines chronic offenders, and recommends predictive test subsets so AI-driven PR volume does not inflate median time-to-green beyond the current 72-minute baseline.
